Petition To Approve Minor Compromise Of Disputed Claim
Off Calendar Mar-10-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Rebecca Wiseman, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Sandra Isabelle C. Tan, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Lolly Velasquez, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: Monica Padilla Velasquez present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $ 40,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $ 13,333.00 payable to Law Firm of The Dolan Law Firm
Costs: $ 20,810.00
A net balance of $ 19,190.00 to be deposited into a blocked account at:
Chase Bank until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on June 14, 2016 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account.
No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514 prior to Hearing.
